description: Instruction paraphrases paired with each image at training time. Pure task prompts (leaf disease description); they carry NO disease knowledge and assert no symptom. The response text always comes verbatim from the frozen caption corpus.
instructions: Describe the visible condition of this mango leaf.
What can you observe on this mango leaf?
Examine this mango leaf and describe any symptoms present.
Provide a diagnostic description of this mango leaf.
Report the visible signs on this mango leaf.
Describe what is shown on this mango leaf image.
Assess this mango leaf and summarize its visible symptoms.
Give a concise description of this mango leaf's appearance.
